'''ây-v-n-p''' ('''kayavnepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illustrate|illustrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illustrate|illustrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-v-n-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayavnepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyavnepoko|thiyavnepoko]] || [[word:jiyavnepoko|jiyavnepoko]] || [[word:shiyavnepoko|shiyavnepoko]] || [[word:kiyavnepoko|kiyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyavnepoko|thuthuyavnepoko]] || [[word:jujuyavnepoko|jujuyavnepoko]] || [[word:shushuyavnepoko|shushuyavnepoko]] || [[word:kukuyavnepoko|kukuyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyavnepoko|thuyavnepoko]] || [[word:juyavnepoko|juyavnepoko]] || [[word:shuyavnepoko|shuyavnepoko]] || [[word:kuyavnepoko|kuyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyavnepoko|thuyavnepoko]] || [[word:juyavnepoko|juyavnepoko]] || [[word:shuyavnepoko|shuyavnepoko]] || [[word:kuyavnepoko|kuyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyavnepoko|theyavnepoko]] || [[word:jeyavnepoko|jeyavnepoko]] || [[word:sheyavnepoko|sheyavnepoko]] || [[word:keyavnepoko|keyavnepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyavnepoko|thoyavnepoko]] || [[word:joyavnepoko|joyavnepoko]] || [[word:shoyavnepoko|shoyavnepoko]] || [[word:koyavnepoko|koyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyavnepoko|thoyavnepoko]] || [[word:joyavnepoko|joyavnepoko]] || [[word:shoyavnepoko|shoyavnepoko]] || [[word:koyavnepoko|koyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyavnepoko|thĂŠyavnepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyavnepoko|jĂŠyavnepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyavnepoko|shĂŠyavnepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyavnepoko|kĂŠyavnepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayavnepoko|thathayavnepoko]] || [[word:jajayavnepoko|jajayavnepoko]] || [[word:shashayavnepoko|shashayavnepoko]] || [[word:kakayavnepoko|kakayavnepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayavnepoko|thayavnepoko]] || [[word:jayavnepoko|jayavnepoko]] || [[word:shayavnepoko|shayavnepoko]] || [[word:kayavnepoko|kayavnepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayavnepoko|thayavnepoko]] || [[word:jayavnepoko|jayavnepoko]] || [[word:shayavnepoko|shayavnepoko]] || [[word:kayavnepoko|kayavnepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
